source: Maricopa County Department of Public Health, 2025 Heat-Related Deaths Report (April 2026), Fig. 'Deaths by Year' and Table A

demographics.source: Maricopa County Department of Public Health, 2024 Heat-Related Deaths Report (May 2025)
demographics.note: Figures are from the final 2024 report (the most recent complete demographic year). Percentages stated as the county reports them; the A/C figure is among indoor deaths where a unit was present.

factors.label: were experiencing homelessness
factors.sub: no shelter from the heat, day or night (299 of 608 deaths)

factors.label: died outdoors
factors.sub: exposed — not in a home whose cooling failed

factors.label: of indoor A/C units weren't working
factors.sub: an air conditioner was present in 88% of indoor deaths; in 70% of those it wasn't functioning — power shutoffs, cost, disrepair

factors.label: were 50 or older
factors.sub: older bodies shed heat less efficiently

factors.label: involved substance use
factors.sub: nearly 9 in 10 of those involved stimulants
